name: Spiritual Light Art - Hijiri
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひじり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
desc: Tribute 1 LIGHT monster to target 1 banished monster; your opponent can reveal 1 Trap Card from their hand to negate this card's effect, otherwise you Special Summon that monster.
eff: Tribute 1 LIGHT monster to target 1 banished monster; your opponent can reveal 1 Trap Card from their hand to negate this card's effect, otherwise you Special Summon that monster.

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
